name: Layout Switcher Helper
description: In-shell helper for the Community Layout Switcher. Performs live layout switches (extension enable/disable/reload + shell stylesheet reload) from inside GNOME Shell, driven over D-Bus by the layout-switcher app. Running inside the shell avoids the cross-process race that hangs gnome-shell during a switch and lets appearance-owning extensions (dash-to-panel, arcmenu, kiwi, light-style, user-theme) re-apply without a logout.
